_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: In this analysis 3129 proteins were identified, 176 were significantly upregulated (Log 2 FC > − 1), and 232 were significantly downregulated
details: Identified 3129 proteins with 176 significantly upregulated and 232 significantly downregulated compared to HMC
